current_facts: 当前不是 true 3D world model。
当前不是 large-scale foundation world model。
当前仍是 protected dataset-local / raw-frame 2.5D 多智能体 world-state candidate。
Stage42-GZ 是 full-waypoint claim guard，不重新训练，不调 threshold，不执行 Stage5C，不启用 SMC。
full-waypoint future labels 只允许作为 supervised/eval label，不允许作为 inference input。
endpoint-only 或 endpoint-linear bridge 成功不能直接写成 learned full-waypoint dynamics 成功。
ungated full-waypoint neural 仍不可部署。
t+50 / t+100 仍是 raw-frame horizon，不能写成 seconds-level。
dataset-local/raw-frame 不能写成 global metric。

claim_rows.claim: Protected full-waypoint sequence evidence exists and can be cited as protected raw-frame 2.5D world-state evidence.
claim_rows.required_boundary: protected dataset-local/raw-frame 2.5D; not ungated, not metric, not seconds-level

claim_rows.claim: Endpoint-only or endpoint-linear bridge success is equivalent to learned full-waypoint dynamics.
claim_rows.evidence: CM endpoint status=diagnostic_only_not_full_waypoint; linear bridge all=21.03%, protected full-waypoint all=18.58%; endpoint bridge may remain a floor but cannot be counted as learned shape.
claim_rows.required_boundary: endpoint bridge and full-waypoint shape must be reported separately

claim_rows.claim: Ungated full-waypoint neural dynamics is deployable.
claim_rows.evidence: CM ungated full-waypoint easy degradation=124.59%; GJ ungated_full_waypoint_deployable=False
claim_rows.required_boundary: deployment requires protected switch / teacher floor

claim_rows.claim: Common-validation full-waypoint composer has positive protected endpoint-bridge replacement evidence.
claim_rows.evidence: CO vs endpoint ADE all/t50/t100raw/hard/easy = 3.02% / 1.50% / 6.12% / 3.28% / 0.25%; use_full_rate=21.35%
claim_rows.required_boundary: protected common-validation composer, not global floor-free replacement

claim_rows.claim: Proximity-aware guard can be omitted without changing the safety claim.
claim_rows.evidence: CQ guarded vs endpoint ADE all/t50/hard = 1.77% / 1.07% / 1.93%; near@0.05 delta vs endpoint=-0.06%
claim_rows.required_boundary: safety-sensitive reports must use proximity-aware guard or explicitly mark caveat

claim_rows.claim: Graph/group consistency can be cited as a protected full-waypoint module, but not as independent neighbor/interaction dominance.
claim_rows.required_boundary: claim must be group-consistency full-waypoint under protected policy; neighbor_interaction remains blocked as independent main claim

claim_rows.claim: Unified row-level full-waypoint evidence supports broad protected source/domain evidence, but not uniform horizon success.
claim_rows.required_boundary: source/domain protected evidence only; weak horizon/h100 blocker remains separate

claim_rows.claim: Global primary full-waypoint replacement claim is allowed.
claim_rows.evidence: GJ global_primary_full_waypoint_replacement_claim_allowed=False; reason=Fresh DI/DL support a protected source-level group-consistency full-waypoint runtime policy with exact replay and proximity repair. However, common-validation endpoint-linear bridge/composer and source-level train-horizon floor use different comparison protocols, so the result cannot be collapsed into a single global primary full-waypoint replacement claim.
claim_rows.required_boundary: report source-level/protected components; do not collapse protocols into global primary replacement

claim_rows.claim: Metric/seconds-level, true-3D, foundation, Stage5C, or SMC claims are allowed.
claim_rows.evidence: All inputs are dataset-local/raw-frame 2.5D evidence; Stage5C and SMC remain false.
